requirement_topic.en: SASO 2902 Lighting Energy Efficiency / MEPS — Minimum Efficacy and Performance
requirement_topic.zh: SASO 2902 照明能效 / MEPS——最低能效及性能要求
requirement_topic.zht: SASO 2902 照明能效 / MEPS——最低能效及性能要求

summary.en: SASO technical regulation SASO 2902 (Energy efficiency, functionality and labelling requirements for lighting products) sets mandatory minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) for lighting products placed on the Saudi market. In-scope LED lamps and luminaires must meet a minimum luminous efficacy (lm/W) threshold by lamp type and luminous-flux band (typical MEPS minima for general LED lamps fall in the ~approx. 70–90 lm/W range depending on category — verify the exact threshold table in the current SASO 2902 edition for the specific product type). The regulation also sets functionality requirements such as minimum rated lifetime, lumen maintenance, power factor, starting/run-up behaviour, and colour rendering for in-scope categories. Products designed for 230/400 V, 60 Hz Saudi mains that do not meet the applicable MEPS minimum cannot obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and cannot be registered on SABER for the Saudi market.
summary.zh: SASO 技术法规 SASO 2902（照明产品的能效、功能及标签要求）对进入沙特市场的照明产品设定强制性最低能效标准（MEPS）。范围内的 LED 灯及灯具须按灯型及光通量区段满足最低光效（lm/W）阈值（通用 LED 灯的典型 MEPS 最低值因类别而异，约为约 70–90 lm/W——请核查现行 SASO 2902 版本中具体产品类型的确切阈值表）。该法规还对范围内类别设定功能要求，如最低额定寿命、光通维持率、功率因数、启动/起燃特性及显色性。按沙特 230/400 V、60 Hz 市电设计但不满足适用 MEPS 最低要求的产品无法取得产品符合性证书（PCoC），也无法在 SABER 上为沙特市场注册。
summary.zht: SASO 技術法規 SASO 2902（照明產品的能效、功能及標籤要求）對進入沙特市場的照明產品設定強制性最低能效標準（MEPS）。範圍內的 LED 燈及燈具須按燈型及光通量區段滿足最低光效（lm/W）閾值（通用 LED 燈的典型 MEPS 最低值因類別而異，約為約 70–90 lm/W——請核查現行 SASO 2902 版本中具體產品類型的確切閾值表）。該法規還對範圍內類別設定功能要求，如最低額定壽命、光通維持率、功率因數、啟動/起燃特性及顯色性。按沙特 230/400 V、60 Hz 市電設計但不滿足適用 MEPS 最低要求的產品無法取得產品符合性證書（PCoC），也無法在 SABER 上為沙特市場註冊。

standards_or_laws: SASO 2902 — Energy efficiency, functionality and labelling requirements for lighting products (Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization — MEPS table by lamp type and luminous-flux band)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires). It defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest): ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2: ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3: ≥70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum required for market entry in China. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products; labels are administered by SAMR. GB 30255 does not comprehensively cover power factor, CRI minimums, or lifetime requirements in the same binding way as the SASO 2902 functionality requirements.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）：≥90 lm/W；2 级：≥80 lm/W；3 级：≥70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，标识由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 未以与 SASO 2902 功能要求相同的约束性方式全面涵盖功率因数、最低显色指数或寿命要求。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）：≥90 lm/W；2 級：≥80 lm/W；3 級：≥70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）註冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，標識由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 未以與 SASO 2902 功能要求相同的約束性方式全面涵蓋功率因數、最低顯色指數或壽命要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: SASO 2902 MEPS minima (category-dependent, broadly in the ~approx. 70–90 lm/W range) must be checked band-by-band against the Chinese grade the product achieves. A Chinese Grade 3 product (≥70 lm/W) may sit at or below the applicable SASO 2902 floor for some categories and fail outright in others — the SASO threshold table is product-type specific and is not a single number. Beyond efficacy, SASO 2902 ties market access to functionality requirements (rated lifetime, lumen maintenance, power factor, colour rendering) for in-scope categories, which GB 30255 does not bind uniformly. Crucially, the route is different: in Saudi Arabia, conformity is demonstrated through a SABER Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) plus the SEEC energy label — not the Chinese CEL grade. Products must also be rated for 230/400 V, 60 Hz Saudi mains, which differs from China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz supply; verify the exact MEPS threshold for the specific product type and flux band against the current SASO 2902 edition before market entry.
gap.zh: SASO 2902 的 MEPS 最低值（取决于类别，大致在约 70–90 lm/W 范围）须按光通量区段逐一与产品所达到的中国等级核对。中国 3 级产品（≥70 lm/W）在某些类别中可能正好处于或低于适用的 SASO 2902 下限，而在另一些类别中则直接不合格——SASO 阈值表因产品类型而异，并非单一数值。除能效外，SASO 2902 将市场准入与范围内类别的功能要求（额定寿命、光通维持率、功率因数、显色性）挂钩，而 GB 30255 并未统一约束这些要求。关键在于路径不同：在沙特，合规通过 SABER 产品符合性证书（PCoC）加 SEEC 能效标签证明——而非中国 CEL 等级。产品还须按沙特 230/400 V、60 Hz 市电定额，这与中国 220/380 V、50 Hz 供电不同；进入市场前，请针对具体产品类型及光通量区段核查现行 SASO 2902 版本中的确切 MEPS 阈值。
gap.zht: SASO 2902 的 MEPS 最低值（取決於類別，大致在約 70–90 lm/W 範圍）須按光通量區段逐一與產品所達到的中國等級核對。中國 3 級產品（≥70 lm/W）在某些類別中可能正好處於或低於適用的 SASO 2902 下限，而在另一些類別中則直接不合格——SASO 閾值表因產品類型而異，並非單一數值。除能效外，SASO 2902 將市場准入與範圍內類別的功能要求（額定壽命、光通維持率、功率因數、顯色性）掛鈎，而 GB 30255 並未統一約束這些要求。關鍵在於路徑不同：在沙特，合規透過 SABER 產品符合性證書（PCoC）加 SEEC 能效標籤證明——而非中國 CEL 等級。產品還須按沙特 230/400 V、60 Hz 市電定額，這與中國 220/380 V、50 Hz 供電不同；進入市場前，請針對具體產品類型及光通量區段核查現行 SASO 2902 版本中的確切 MEPS 閾值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products not meeting the applicable SASO 2902 MEPS minimum cannot obtain a SABER Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and cannot be placed on the Saudi market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: SABER / Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SASO 2902 sets mandatory minimum efficacy and functionality requirements (lifetime, lumen maintenance, power factor, colour rendering) for lighting products placed on the Saudi market, enforced through the SABER PCoC process. Chinese Grade 3 products (≥70 lm/W) may not meet the applicable SASO 2902 floor for every category — the threshold table is product-type and flux-band specific. Compliance is demonstrated via a SABER PCoC plus the SEEC energy label, not the Chinese CEL grade, and products must be rated for 230/400 V, 60 Hz. Verify the exact MEPS threshold for the specific product type in the current SASO 2902 edition before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SASO 2902 对进入沙特市场的照明产品设定最低能效及功能（寿命、光通维持率、功率因数、显色性）强制要求，通过 SABER PCoC 流程执行。中国 3 级产品（≥70 lm/W）可能并非在每个类别都满足适用的 SASO 2902 下限——阈值表因产品类型及光通量区段而异。合规通过 SABER PCoC 加 SEEC 能效标签证明，而非中国 CEL 等级，且产品须按 230/400 V、60 Hz 定额。进入市场前，请核查现行 SASO 2902 版本中具体产品类型的确切 MEPS 阈值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SASO 2902 對進入沙特市場的照明產品設定最低能效及功能（壽命、光通維持率、功率因數、顯色性）強制要求，透過 SABER PCoC 流程執行。中國 3 級產品（≥70 lm/W）可能並非在每個類別都滿足適用的 SASO 2902 下限——閾值表因產品類型及光通量區段而異。合規透過 SABER PCoC 加 SEEC 能效標籤證明，而非中國 CEL 等級，且產品須按 230/400 V、60 Hz 定額。進入市場前，請核查現行 SASO 2902 版本中具體產品類型的確切 MEPS 閾值。

requirement_topic.en: SEEC Energy-Efficiency Label + SABER Registration (SASO 2902 labelling)
requirement_topic.zh: SEEC 能效标签 + SABER 注册（SASO 2902 标签要求）
requirement_topic.zht: SEEC 能效標籤 + SABER 註冊（SASO 2902 標籤要求）

summary.en: The Saudi Energy Efficiency Centre (SEEC) energy-efficiency label is mandatory for in-scope lighting products under SASO 2902, and registration is carried through the SABER platform. The energy class shown on the SEEC lighting label is derived from the product's measured luminous efficacy relative to the SASO reference scale for the product category. Mandatory steps before Saudi market entry: (1) determine the product's energy class against the SASO 2902 efficacy scale; (2) register the product model on the SABER platform and obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) from a SASO-approved Conformity Assessment Body, with the SEEC label artwork registered/approved through SASO; (3) print and affix the SEEC Arabic-language energy label on product packaging and the physical product where required, and obtain a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for each consignment before customs clearance at Jeddah or Dammam.
summary.zh: 依据 SASO 2902，沙特能效中心（SEEC）能效标签对范围内照明产品为强制要求，注册通过 SABER 平台进行。SEEC 照明标签上显示的能效等级根据产品实测光效相对于该产品类别的 SASO 参考标尺得出。进入沙特市场前的强制步骤：（1）依据 SASO 2902 能效标尺确定产品能效等级；（2）在 SABER 平台注册产品型号，并从 SASO 批准的合格评定机构（CAB）取得产品符合性证书（PCoC），SEEC 标签图样经 SASO 注册/批准；（3）在产品包装及（如有要求）实物产品上印制并贴附阿拉伯文 SEEC 能效标签，并在吉达或达曼清关前为每批货物取得装运符合性证书（SCoC）。
summary.zht: 依據 SASO 2902，沙特能效中心（SEEC）能效標籤對範圍內照明產品為強制要求，註冊透過 SABER 平台進行。SEEC 照明標籤上顯示的能效等級根據產品實測光效相對於該產品類別的 SASO 參考標尺得出。進入沙特市場前的強制步驟：（1）依據 SASO 2902 能效標尺確定產品能效等級；（2）在 SABER 平台註冊產品型號，並從 SASO 批准的合格評定機構（CAB）取得產品符合性證書（PCoC），SEEC 標籤圖樣經 SASO 註冊/批准；（3）在產品包裝及（如有要求）實物產品上印製並貼附阿拉伯文 SEEC 能效標籤，並在吉達或達曼清關前為每批貨物取得裝運符合性證書（SCoC）。

standards_or_laws: SASO 2902 — Energy efficiency, functionality and labelling requirements for lighting products (SEEC energy-efficiency label; SABER PCoC/SCoC registration)

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires. Products must be registered with the CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CECP (China Energy Conservation Programme) before affixing the CEL. The CEL shows Grade 1–3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between the Saudi SABER/SEEC registration scheme and the CN CEL registration scheme.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附中国能效标识前向中国质量认证中心（CQC）或中国节能产品认证（CECP）进行注册。CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1–3 级。沙特 SABER/SEEC 注册方案与中国能效标识注册方案之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附中國能效標識前向中國質量認證中心（CQC）或中國節能產品認證（CECP）進行註冊。CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1–3 級。沙特 SABER/SEEC 註冊方案與中國能效標識註冊方案之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: The SABER platform registration plus a SASO-approved CAB-issued PCoC is a mandatory pre-market step with no CN equivalent — the Chinese CEL registration with CQC/CECP does not substitute for it. The SEEC label class is set against the SASO 2902 efficacy scale for the product category, while the CN CEL grade uses GB 30255 absolute lm/W thresholds — they are not directly comparable, and a product's CN grade does not determine its Saudi SEEC class. Both schemes are mandatory but non-mutual: a product must be registered separately on SABER (PCoC + per-shipment SCoC) for Saudi Arabia and with CQC/CECP for CN. Additionally, the Saudi SEEC label must be in Arabic and is part of the SABER PCoC technical file; the per-shipment SCoC has no CN counterpart and must be obtained before customs clearance at Jeddah or Dammam.
gap.zh: SABER 平台注册加上 SASO 批准的 CAB 签发的 PCoC 是强制性上市前步骤，无中国对应要求——中国向 CQC/CECP 的 CEL 注册不可替代。SEEC 标签等级依据该产品类别的 SASO 2902 能效标尺设定，而中国 CEL 等级采用 GB 30255 绝对 lm/W 阈值——两者不可直接比较，产品的中国等级不能决定其沙特 SEEC 等级。两种方案均为强制性但不存在互认：产品须分别在 SABER 注册（PCoC + 每批 SCoC）以进入沙特，及在中国向 CQC/CECP 注册。此外，沙特 SEEC 标签须为阿拉伯文，并属于 SABER PCoC 技术文件的一部分；每批货物的 SCoC 无中国对应要求，须在吉达或达曼清关前取得。
gap.zht: SABER 平台註冊加上 SASO 批准的 CAB 簽發的 PCoC 是強制性上市前步驟，無中國對應要求——中國向 CQC/CECP 的 CEL 註冊不可替代。SEEC 標籤等級依據該產品類別的 SASO 2902 能效標尺設定，而中國 CEL 等級採用 GB 30255 絕對 lm/W 閾值——兩者不可直接比較，產品的中國等級不能決定其沙特 SEEC 等級。兩種方案均為強制性但不存在互認：產品須分別在 SABER 註冊（PCoC + 每批 SCoC）以進入沙特，及在中國向 CQC/CECP 註冊。此外，沙特 SEEC 標籤須為阿拉伯文，並屬於 SABER PCoC 技術文件的一部分；每批貨物的 SCoC 無中國對應要求，須在吉達或達曼清關前取得。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SEEC energy label and SABER registration (PCoC + per-shipment SCoC) required before Saudi market placement under SASO 2902; PCoC issued by a SASO-approved Conformity Assessment Body
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: SABER / Saudi Standards, Metrology and Quality Organization (SASO)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Saudi SEEC energy label and SABER registration (PCoC issued by a SASO-approved CAB, plus a per-shipment SCoC) are mandatory for in-scope lighting products under SASO 2902. Chinese CEL registration does not substitute for SABER/SEEC. The SASO-scale SEEC class and the GB 30255 lm/W-based CN grade are calculated differently and cannot be directly cross-mapped. Register the product model on SABER and obtain the PCoC before first market placement; the SEEC label must be in Arabic, and a separate SCoC is required for each consignment cleared at Jeddah or Dammam.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据 SASO 2902，沙特 SEEC 能效标签及 SABER 注册（由 SASO 批准的 CAB 签发 PCoC，加每批 SCoC）对范围内照明产品为强制要求。中国 CEL 注册不可替代 SABER/SEEC。基于 SASO 标尺的 SEEC 等级与基于 GB 30255 lm/W 的中国等级计算方式不同，不可直接互换。请在首次上市前在 SABER 注册产品型号并取得 PCoC；SEEC 标签须为阿拉伯文，且在吉达或达曼清关的每批货物均须取得独立的 SCoC。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據 SASO 2902，沙特 SEEC 能效標籤及 SABER 註冊（由 SASO 批准的 CAB 簽發 PCoC，加每批 SCoC）對範圍內照明產品為強制要求。中國 CEL 註冊不可替代 SABER/SEEC。基於 SASO 標尺的 SEEC 等級與基於 GB 30255 lm/W 的中國等級計算方式不同，不可直接互換。請在首次上市前在 SABER 註冊產品型號並取得 PCoC；SEEC 標籤須為阿拉伯文，且在吉達或達曼清關的每批貨物均須取得獨立的 SCoC。
